title: AuditLogEntry
description: A structured record of one routing execution, sufficient to replay the decision and obtain an identical result.

timestamp.description: When the execution occurred. Recorded for audit; not an input to routing.

snapshot_id.description: Reference to the confirmed snapshot used.

fired_rules.description: Ordered ids of rules that fired, forming the decision trace.

result_id.description: Reference to the produced routing result.

result_digest.description: Content digest of the routing result, used to verify a replay reproduced the same output.

llm_involved_in_routing.description: Always false. Documents that no model participated in the decision.

replayable.description: Always true; the entry contains everything needed to replay.
